original: You can only wear one patch at a time.
e.capitalA+e.short+" uses the patch, but nothing happens.
You tear the packet open and pull the smooth paper covering the adhesive side.
Since you’re already naked, you go ahead and slap the patch on your [pc.ass].
You reach into your [pc.armor] and press the patch onto your [pc.ass].
You reach into your [pc.lowerUndergarment] and do your best to slap the patch onto your [pc.ass].

The moment the patch is secure, you flinch when a low level electric shock fires into your buttocks. After that, the occupied spot on your butt grows warm. You adjust to the heat of the patch and it begins to gently vibrate against your [pc.skin].

context: <<POS:06230303>> createPerk("Buns of Steel",0,0,0,0,"Your ass is always firm, regardless of tone.")
